abstract: Specifies an item should be stored in the device’s Secure Enclave.
overview:
## Discussion

The only keychain items supported by the Secure Enclave are 256-bit elliptic curve private keys (those that have key type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeyTypeEC]). Such keys must be generated directly on the Secure Enclave using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyGeneratePair(_:_:_:)] function with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrTokenID] key set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave] in the parameters dictionary.

# kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave

**Global Variable**

Specifies an item should be stored in the device’s Secure Enclave.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave: CFString
```

## Discussion

The only keychain items supported by the Secure Enclave are 256-bit elliptic curve private keys (those that have key type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeyTypeEC]). Such keys must be generated directly on the Secure Enclave using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyGeneratePair(_:_:_:)] function with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrTokenID] key set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave] in the parameters dictionary.
title: kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave
